completeness.notes: Covers only the three endpoints used by apps/para/src/client.rs (POST /v1/wallets, GET /v1/wallets/{walletId}, POST /v1/wallets/{walletId}/sign-raw). Wallet response shape (additional fields beyond id/type/status/address/publicKey) and the exact SignRawResponse shape are not fully documented in public docs — both schemas use additionalProperties: true. Wallet `status` enum is intentionally left open (only `creating`, `ready`, `error` are observed in the existing app code). 4xx/5xx error envelope is permissive.
